description: Core Mechanical Ethics registry for EthicBit / CEMU.

rules.description: Every critical system must preserve complete auditable traceability for each critical decision.
rules.justification: Sin trazabilidad completa no es posible demostrar cumplimiento ético ante auditorías externas o regulatorias.

rules.description: All evidence of compliance must be immutable and tamper-proof.
rules.justification: La evidencia mutable permite manipulación posterior y destruye la confianza en el sistema ético.

rules.description: Every decision must be explainable with clear causal chain.
rules.justification: Las decisiones opacas violan el principio de accountability y generan riesgo legal.
